selections.name: Quarry Man
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after a strong win at Longreach. Well placed to score again.

selections.name: Ten Carat Lucy
selections.reason: Consistent form with a solid second last start. Key runner.

selections.name: Idhana
selections.reason: Won well at Thangool recently. Drawn perfectly to feature.

selections.name: Marellity
selections.reason: Fair effort last start, can sneak into the placings.

danger_horse.name: Darth Invader
danger_horse.reason: Will appreciate the drop in class and could surprise.

selections.name: Hello Punters
selections.reason: Won impressively at Gold Coast last start. Top pick.

selections.name: Switch The Stars
selections.reason: Broke maiden status with a dominant 6-length win. Big threat.

selections.name: Next Legacy
selections.reason: Resuming but has a good fresh record. Can run a bold race.

selections.name: Gypsy's Daughter
selections.reason: Drawn well and has shown ability. Place claims.

danger_horse.name: Tarong
danger_horse.reason: Dropping back from Open class, could improve.

selections.name: Sport
selections.reason: Solid third last start and should be peaking fourth-up.

selections.name: Agnar
selections.reason: Promising debut when third. Natural improvement expected.

selections.name: Watchfulwilderness
selections.reason: Well supported on debut and drawn the inside. Can bounce back.

selections.name: Check One Two
selections.reason: Resuming but has trialled well. Worth including.

danger_horse.name: Gem Maker
danger_horse.reason: First starter from a good stable, watch betting.

selections.name: Lonergy
selections.reason: Chasing back-to-back wins after a strong victory here. Top chance despite the draw.

selections.name: Sujeed
selections.reason: Consistent performer who rarely runs a bad race. Strong claims.

selections.name: Luxor Prince
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly and wasn't far away last start. Value runner.

selections.name: Better Than Words
selections.reason: Can bounce back from a slightly disappointing run last time.

danger_horse.name: Wildspitze
danger_horse.reason: Wide draw is a concern but has the ability to feature.

selections.name: Sailor's Rum
selections.reason: Impressive winner last start and can go on with it here.

selections.name: Northumbria
selections.reason: Resuming but boasts a strong fresh record. Major player.

selections.name: Don Pedro
selections.reason: Class runner of the field resuming. Drawn to get a soft run.

selections.name: Electric Brae
selections.reason: Racing well and looks a solid each-way prospect.

danger_horse.name: Dark Gleam
danger_horse.reason: Fitter second-up and can improve sharply.

selections.name: Living Free
selections.reason: Classy type dropping back in grade. Will be storming home late.

selections.name: Pride Of Venus
selections.reason: Flying at present and can overcome the tricky draw.

selections.name: Letmeletgo
selections.reason: Wide draw makes it tough but has the talent to overcome it.

selections.name: Obligated
selections.reason: Won well last start and remains a strong contender.

danger_horse.name: Demon Award
danger_horse.reason: Consistent type who is always around the mark.

selections.name: Here To Shock
selections.reason: Elite class runner dropping back from Group company. The one to beat.

selections.name: Givemethebeatboys
selections.reason: Excellent form and drawn perfectly to strike.

selections.name: The Inflictor
selections.reason: Great inside draw and comes off a solid Group 3 effort.

selections.name: Rothfire
selections.reason: Class act who can never be discounted despite the wide gate.

danger_horse.name: Yellow Brick
danger_horse.reason: Quality galloper who can sprint well fresh.

selections.name: More Trouble
selections.reason: Dominant winner last start and can repeat despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Pulveriser
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last time and looks ready to win.

selections.name: Smart Action
selections.reason: Consistent form and maps to get a good run.

selections.name: Inca Trail
selections.reason: Won well last start and can take the next step.

danger_horse.name: New Level
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the inside and comes off a nice win. Respect.
